title: Dirt Plus
description: Adds various types of dirt, sand, and clay blocks.
body:
INFO

Dirt plus adds many variants of dirt, sand, and clay blocks. It even adds petrified sand and dirt. Petrified sand won't fall, and petrified dirt won't turn to grass.

The mod also adds dirt shears, so you can turn grass into dirt.

All of the recipes are identical to vanilla ones. The only exception is the recipe for walls

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

BUGS
 

Unfortunately, the sounds of the redstone blocks are inaccurate to their respective materials. This is something I can't fix.
